rbi_mfi_pricing_grounded.grounding_corpus: The microfinance lender must disclose the effective interest rate and all processing charges in the loan agreement and the factsheet. A board-approved pricing policy must cap the interest margin. Recovery practices must avoid harassment and the lender must publish a grievance redressal mechanism with a nodal officer.

mapping.gap_analysis: Company factsheet does not yet surface the effective interest rate.

requirement_gaps.gap_description: No board-approved pricing policy capping the interest margin is on file.
Factsheet omits processing charges disclosure in the loan agreement.
Grievance redressal nodal officer already published.

rbi_mfi_pricing_hallucinated.grounding_corpus: The microfinance lender must disclose the effective interest rate and all processing charges in the loan agreement and the factsheet. A board-approved pricing policy must cap the interest margin.

requirement_gaps.gap_description: Company has not appointed a chief cryptocurrency custodian for offshore derivative settlement.

sebi_ria_not_relevant.grounding_corpus: Registered investment advisers must maintain records of risk profiling and disclose conflicts of interest.

mapping.gap_analysis: Regulation applies to investment advisers; company is an NBFC-MFI.

certin_incident_bad_confidence.grounding_corpus: Body corporates must report cyber security incidents to CERT-In within six hours of detection and maintain logs for 180 days in the Indian jurisdiction.

requirement_gaps.gap_description: No six hour incident reporting workflow to CERT-In is configured.
